description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sw that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs, one for Windows and one for Linux. The Windows job runs on a windows-2022 environment, checks out the code, uses the sw-action, builds the source with ./sw build source -static, and uploads the binaries as an artifact. The Linux job runs in a fedora:35 container on an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checks out the code, installs dependencies, uses the sw-action, builds the source with ./sw -static build source -compiler gcc, and uploads the sw artifact.
